ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_number" INTEGER /* Test number or identifier */,
  "sza_count" INTEGER /* Number of SZAs (Spectral Zooming Algorithms) used in the test */,
  "fourier_transform" TEXT /* Fourier transform configuration (e.g., 7/8, 8) */,
  "stream_count" INTEGER /* Number of streams processed */,
  "solution_saving" TEXT /* Indicates if a saving solution was applied (Y/N) */,
  "telescoping" TEXT /* Indicates if telescoping was used (Y/N) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the test in seconds */,
  "resource_saving" TEXT /* Percentage of resource saving achieved by the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test, including any additional notes or comments */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the test */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the test */,
  "io_operations" INTEGER /* Number of input/output operations performed during the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to which the configuration belongs */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Detailed configuration settings */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created or updated */,
  "config_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., execution time, resource saving) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., time, memory, resource) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, MB, percentage) */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "solution_name" TEXT /* Name of the solution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solution */,
  "solution_version" TEXT /* Version of the solution */,
  "solution_author" TEXT /* Author of the solution */,
  "solution_date" TEXT /* Date when the solution was created or updated */,
  "solution_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the solution (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_solutions" (
  "test_solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-solution link */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution used in the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_solutions_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_solutions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "user_access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for developer, 3 for researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the report is generated for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)
